# EVA标题生成器 / EVA Title Generator

Site: https://eva-title-generator.pages.dev
Primary languages: zh-CN, en-US
Type: bilingual static website with an interactive EVA-style title cover generator

## Summary

EVA标题生成器 is a bilingual Chinese and English web app for generating EVA-inspired title cover images.
It supports multiple output sizes for X, video covers, slides, WeChat headers, and ultrawide banners.
The generator exports both PNG and SVG.

## Core capabilities

- Always-centered title composition across all themes
- Two-color EVA-style themes
- Mobile and desktop responsive preview stage
- PNG export for immediate publishing
- SVG export for further editing
- Chinese and English UI and content support

## Font source and homage

The generator uses the Eva-Ming-SC font in this repository.
The site explicitly pays tribute to: https://github.com/kaonashi-tyc/Eva-Ming-Simplified

## Main pages

- / : Chinese homepage
- /en : English homepage

## Important user-facing facts

- The site is designed for non-commercial use in its current setup.
- Titles and subtitles are centered in every theme.
- Preview is scaled to fit the stage, while exports keep the original resolution.
